title: Abbott taps Robert Howden as Texas secretary of state before midterms
shortDescription: Gov. Greg Abbott appointed Robert Howden as the new Texas secretary of state to replace outgoing Jane Nelson. Here's what we know.

title: Texas Democrats wans state to see whether Paxton violated election law
shortDescription: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton's campaign is pushing back against Texas Democrats' complaint alleging that he violated state election laws.

title: Trump administration to appeal trans troop ruling to Supreme Court
shortDescription: The Trump administration wants to pause a ruling that it can't remove some transgender members of the military for now.

title: Reactions to Trump's election integrity speech toe party lines
shortDescription: Despie declassifying documents and providing no evidence prior U.S. election returns had been jeopardized, reactions to Trump's speech were naturally divisive.

title: China, Russia react to Trump speech
shortDescription: Both China and Russia denied President Donald Trump’s allegations of election interference in 2020.

title: Dem leaders react to Trump speech
shortDescription: Democratic leaders react to President Donald Trump's speech that exacerbated U.S. election fraud claims and China's alleged involvement.

title: Trump revives 2020 fraud allegations as experts challenge his evidence
shortDescription: President Donald Trump made many allegations in his address on election integrity. Experts, former U.S. intelligence officials are skeptical.

title: 'Good Trouble' rallies return to protest Trump policies
shortDescription: Protesters are gathering nationwide for 'Good Trouble Lives On' rallies to advocate for civil and voting rights.

title: As Trump warns of election threats, independent agencies have been cut
shortDescription: Trump has reduced federal agencies that support election security, leaving states to defend their own systems.

title: Trump claims US election vulnerabilities in primetime speech: 5 takeaways
shortDescription: The president said America's elections are 'worse than a third-world country' after making broad claims about China meddling in the 2020 contest

title: Trump's election speech focuses not on the midterms, but on 2020. Why?
shortDescription: In President Trump's primetime address, the main topic wasn't the economy or war in Iran. It was his grievances about the only election he has lost.

title: Newsom calls Trump's address "the ramblings of a mad king"
shortDescription: California Gov. Gavin Newsom responded to President Donald Trump's address, calling it "the ramblings of a mad king" and urging voters to turn out in the 2026 election.

title: Trump questions California elections in integrity speech
shortDescription: Gov. Gavin Newsom, California governor hopeful Xavier Becerra and more responded to the president's remarks about elections and voting in the U.S.

title: 8 major ways Trump tried to overturn the 2020 election
shortDescription: From election fraud claims to Jan. 6, here's a look at eight key efforts Trump and his allies made to challenge the 2020 election.

title: Trump claims cover-up of China election meddling
shortDescription: In a primetime address to the nation, President Trump claimed the so-called "deep state" hid evidence of China election meddling.

title: Trump slams ABC, NBC for not carrying his speech
shortDescription: President Trump called for the FCC to revoke ABC's and NBC's television licenses for choosing not to broadcast his primetime address.

title: Trump claims elections vulnerable to interference
shortDescription: President Trump said Americans have for years been "blatantly lied to" about the security of election infrastructure, including voting machines.

title: President Trump addresses nation in primetime speech: See the photos
shortDescription: President Trump addressed the nation on election security and voting issues ahead of November’s midterm elections.

title: US attorney fired the same day as appointment. Trump news today
shortDescription: Karoline Leavitt is back from maternity leave and a teleprompter operator was placed on leave. What's happening in President Donald Trump's world today.

title: Republicans are forging ahead with a plan for Trump's SAVE Act. Is it doomed?
shortDescription: Vice President JD Vance has embraced the House GOP's plan to pass SAVE America. One Republican, however, is calling the effort a "waste of time."

title: Trump approval stuck at 37% in new poll
shortDescription: Trump's approval remains stuck in the 30s as a new poll shows growing voter frustration with the economy and the Iran conflict.
